steps.title: Join the though-clause
steps.content: The sentence begins with the dependent clause 'Though it was designated as mission STS-103.' That introductory dependent clause must be followed by a comma before the independent clause begins.

steps.title: Keep one clean sentence
steps.content: A adds an unnecessary 'and' after the comma. B creates a fragment before the main clause. C gives no punctuation between the dependent and independent clauses. A comma alone after the mission name correctly separates the clauses. The answer is D.
